reason: This video is a promotional/educational overview of Nadkarni's Medical Training Academy, featuring Dr. Akshay Nadkarni introducing the laparoscopy training program. The content includes institutional tours, training facility overviews, classroom instruction, outdoor activities, and certification ceremony. There is no actual FLS task performance (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) being executed.
confidence_rationale: The video clearly shows institutional/promotional content with multiple scene transitions, instructor presentations, and facility overviews. No isolated FLS task trainer setup, timed performance, or instrument-based surgical task execution is visible.
